titleStmt.title: SII 30.162: original edition by N. Marxia Gandhi, A. Padmavathy and S. Swaminathan
No. 162. (A.R. No. 241 of 1915.) Brahmadēsam, Cheyyar Taluk, North Arcot District. Chandramauḷīśvara temple-on the south wall Pārtivēndravarman: year 12, day 184: 971 A.D.

summary.p: The inscription records the gift of 525 kuḻi of tax free land by Pōttan Maḍuvuḍaiya Veḷiyaṉ Nuḷambar Viśuddhamati Paṇḍita for the sacred bath of the God, Śrī Pōndaipperumāṉaḍikaḷ, three times (santis) in the day and midnight (ardhayāma) by a person well-versed in Vēdas. The Gaṇvāriyapperumakkaḷ were entrusted with the responsibility of executing the charity.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . kopārtdhivendrātipaṉmaṟki yāṇṭu paṉṉiraṇṭu nāḷ nūṟṟu Eṇpattunālu tāmark koṭṭattu tiruvekampapuṟattu
Irājamalla catuṟvetimaṅkalattu śrīpontaiy perumāṉaṭikaḷukku pottaṉ maṭuvuṭaiya veḷiyaṉṉuḷampar viśu
tdhamatipaṇṭitar Iṟaiyiliyāka sabhaiyār pakkal mañcikkamāṉa kaṭukili kuḻi Aññūṟṟirupattu Añcey
kuḻiyum śrīpontaiy perumāṉai muṉṟu sandhiyum Artdhayāmamum vetam vallaṉāy nalla
ṉ Abhiṣekam ceyvānukku kaṭaikkāka vatteṉ viśuddhamati paṇṭitaneṉ Idhanmam Avvāṇṭu
śrī koyilvāriyañ ceykiṉṟa kaṇapperumakkaḷey kaṭaikkāṇpārāka vaiytteṉ I
ttukku tiṅku niṉaittār geṅgā kaṉniyā tiram naṭuvu ceytār ceyta pāvam koḷ
Iddharmmam rakṣippāruṭaiya śrīpāta tūḷi Eṉ cirasiṉa Aṟam maṟavel A
y Illai Iddharmmam śrīmāheśvararuṭaiya rakṣai ..
Digital edition of SII 30.162 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
